section_miscategorizations.text: Rescribe meloxicam 15mg daily for right knee pain and ibuprofen 800mg twice daily as needed for right knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The word 'Rescribe' implies continuation or renewal of an existing medication, which could be interpreted as current medication state (S) versus a new or changed order (P). However, it is framed as an explicit medication directive, so remaining in P is acceptable; the issue is wording rather than section placement.
